top_signals.title: Leaked documents show world’s biggest miner quietly shelved billions in climate projects
top_signals.summary: Leaked documents reveal BHP delayed climate projects in Western Australia despite internal warnings about reputational risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cox Group Took 20% Bridge Loan for Mexico Deal
top_signals.summary: Spanish utility Cox ABG Group SA took a bridge loan to help fund a $4.2 billion asset acquisition in Mexico and placed shares as collateral.
